stemHtml: Following a microburst encounter on approach, during the go-around…

options.a: It may be necessary to increase the pitch beyond the point at which a stall warning activates.
options.b: The pilot should delay applying maximum power until the aircraft is established in the climb.
options.c: A pitch angle may be required that is close to the point of the onset of a stall warning.
options.d: Speed control has greater priority than reaching an optimised pitch angle.
